sections.subtitle: Current Form Analysis
sections.text: Inter are in strong form with 3 wins in their last 5 matches, showcasing solid attacking and defensive play. Lazio have also been consistent, remaining unbeaten in their last 6 matches, though often playing low-scoring games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Inter dominate recent head-to-head encounters, winning both of the last two matches against Lazio with convincing scores of 2-0 and 6-0. Lazio have struggled to score against Inter, failing to find the net in these games.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Inter rank 2nd in the league with 75 goals scored and a strong defense conceding only 33, while Lazio sit at 5th with 59 goals scored but a less robust defense conceding 46. Inter's superior possession (59.8%) and chance creation (118 big chances) give them an edge.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Inter miss key forward Lautaro Martínez, but Marcus Thuram (14 goals) remains a threat. Lazio are without Mattia Zaccagni, impacting their attack, though Valentín Castellanos (10 goals) could pose a challenge.
